name: PetKind Tripe Dry Grain-Free Green Beef Tripe Formula Dry Dog Food
description: PetKind’s Green Beef Tripe Formula Dry Dog Food is made with fresh, quality ingredients like green beef tripe and organic quinoa. Green tripe is the unbleached, nutrient rich stomach lining of grass-fed cows containing essential fatty acids and digestive juices important for your pet’s health. 70% of the protein in green tripe is composed of seven major amino acids that help maintain muscle and joint health, metabolize sugars and fats, and support a strong immune system. The Tripe Dry Formula allows the fresh and wholesome ingredients to speak the loudest, providing exceptional nutrition for your pet.
